_description: TOFU/MOFU/BOFU conversion tracking. Update this manually when you have real data.
_instructions: Track which funnel stage is converting. This tells AMAE where to focus content each week.
recommendation: No data yet. Default: 60% TOFU, 30% MOFU, 10% BOFU for new products.
_how_to_update: After each week, update the stage metrics with real observed numbers. AMAE memory-agent.js reads this to adjust content mix.
